description_long: This object is a weathered stone grave marker, partially embedded in a circular patch of ground covered with brown, decaying leaves. The headstone is upright, rectangular with a rounded top, and displays a rough, aged surface with visible moss and lichen growth, especially near its base. The front face features faint, eroded inscriptions that are difficult to decipher, suggesting significant age and exposure to the elements. The stone's coloration transitions from a pale, almost white top to a greenish, mossy lower section, blending into the leafy ground. The base is surrounded by a thick layer of fallen leaves, adding to the sense of abandonment and natural decay. The overall appearance evokes a somber, historical atmosphere typical of old graveyards.
description: A weathered stone headstone with moss and faint inscriptions, set in a patch of fallen brown leaves. The marker is aged, rough, and partially covered in green moss at its base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profile of the headstone, with visible vertical striations and moss at the base, surrounded by brown leaves.
description_view_1: Rear view of the headstone, displaying a broad, rough stone surface with green moss and leafy ground cover.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with a slightly different moss pattern and more visible leaf coverage at the base.
description_view_3: Front view of the headstone, showing faint, eroded inscriptions and a concentration of moss at the lower section.
